text:
(In reply to Martin Waschbüsch from comment #14)

Well spotted. I will change that before I submit it to the ports tree.

Have you managed to test the latest devel/sope and www/sogo? Any issues? I'm doing fine on my personal domain, but I don't use calendaring on a daily basis. I guess I should submit it soon.
